reviews.review_description: yesterday i saw a little kid pretending to be the owner i even got recording of it and he said that he would ban me so he did but i didn't really mind because i downloaded all so yesterday it was saturday 23 2026 mostly players will be worried but i didn't i notice the voice was a  little bit kiddish so i got out the game and rejoined i wasn't banned i was kicked so you ever see someone flying around and having a big name named owner please ban them if the real owner is actually hearing this and yes i love it

i hate this game because the owner i found the owner and then he was having a private talk with another player that made um this gro game and i interrupted one time and then he permanent me banded me and i have all of this on video on my youtube channel

When I watched the game on YouTube, the map was different from the map in my VR game. You need a green button to open the underground hatch, but I've searched the whole map and I can't find the green button.
The co owner joined my server while i was name changing and just kicked me for no reason along with other kids so get better workers
